# StayApp

> All-in-one digital platform for service businesses — hotels, restaurants, activities, freelancers, agencies, gyms and more.

## What is StayApp
StayApp is a SaaS platform that gives any service business a complete digital presence via an installable PWA (Progressive Web App) accessible by scanning a QR code. No app store required.

## Features
- Installable PWA via QR code (unique differentiator — no competitor offers this integrated)
- Mini-website / landing page with drag-and-drop page builder
- Booking system for resources and events
- CRM with pipeline (Kanban), newsletter, email automations
- Reviews & reputation management
- E-commerce / shop with loyalty points and gift cards
- AI content studio (social posts, editorial calendar)
- Google Calendar sync
- Custom domains and subdomains
- GDPR-native (auto-generated privacy policy, cookie banner)
- Multi-module: hotel, restaurant, activity/experience

## Target
Service businesses worldwide: hotels, B&Bs, restaurants, bars, tour operators, gyms, coaches, freelancers, professional studios, agencies.

## Technology
React 18 + Vite PWA, Node.js + Express, Supabase (PostgreSQL), hosted on Vercel + Railway.

## Links
- Platform: https://stayapp-henna.vercel.app
